title: Thread
description: The container for reasoning. Field names here match the actual ThreadCreated runtime payload (src/cli.js threadCreate, src/validator.js validateThreadCreated), not the older snake_case shape (problem_statement/visibility/evidence_ids/claim_ids/...) this file previously described -- the thread object itself does not carry lists of its evidence, claims, positions, objections, or decisions; those are derived by projecting the event log, not stored on the thread. See the schemas/v0-vs-runtime sync item before treating any sibling file in this directory as ground truth.
